title: Dell Technologies — Campaign Highlights
subtitle: Content, Webinars & Event Management

paragraphs: Deep-dive into the content production and event management scope of the Dell OEM marketing role, covering multi-format content creation, webinar program management, and international event coordination.
bullets: Produced website content, email marketing campaigns, PR content and social media assets for Dell OEM Vietnam
Organised and executed monthly webinars exceeding KPI targets by 120%
Tracked campaign performance processing data from 1,000+ calls per week
Analysed ~100 VIP customer records for weekly reporting to regional leadership
Supported international Dell events in Vietnam and Singapore with 450+ global participants
Collaborated with APAC regional teams on campaign localisation and go-to-market planning

summary: Second Dell Technologies page focused on campaign highlights: content production, webinar program (120% KPI overachievement), VIP data analysis, and international event support across Vietnam and Singapore.
